context: Tests whether the answer uses the current iOS 26 MapKit geocoding, address, and PlaceDescriptor APIs accurately while preserving correct cycling availability.

checklist.name: Optional Request
checklist.description: Handles the optional initializer result or otherwise accounts for invalid address strings.

checklist.name: Reverse Geocoding
checklist.description: Uses MKReverseGeocodingRequest(location:) for coordinate reverse geocoding.

checklist.name: Address Type
checklist.description: Uses MKAddress or MKMapItem.address for structured/full address output.

checklist.name: Representations
checklist.description: Uses MKMapItem.addressRepresentations or MKAddressRepresentations with fullAddress(includingRegion:singleLine:).

checklist.name: Place Descriptor
checklist.description: Uses PlaceDescriptor with coordinate or address representations for places without a provider place ID.

checklist.name: MapItem Request
checklist.description: Uses MKMapItemRequest(placeDescriptor:) to resolve a PlaceDescriptor.

checklist.name: iOS 26 Scope
checklist.description: Marks the new geocoding, address representation, or PlaceDescriptor APIs as iOS 26+ without applying that availability to unrelated older APIs.

checklist.name: Cycling Availability
checklist.description: Treats cycling directions as an iOS 14+ transport type, not an iOS 26-only feature.
